content.text: {"overview":"This piece in C# minor is built around a nocturne-like triplet-arpeggiated texture that persists throughout, creating an intimate, meditative atmosphere anchored by a singing upper-voice melody and sustained bass pedals. Its most distinctive harmonic feature is a wide-ranging development section that traverses F# major and G# minor before a prolonged dominant pedal prepares the recapitulation, revealing a clear sonata-form architecture beneath the lyrical surface.","cross_piece_tags":["sonata_form","nocturne","arpeggiated_bass","pedal_point","lyrical","meditative","melancholic","modal_mixture"]}
